description: Copy a specialty LaTeX treatment-plan template (general_medical, rehabilitation, mental_health, chronic_disease, perioperative, pain_management) from the vendored asset library into the record store.
rules: non-interactive: TEMPLATE_TYPE selects the template (no stdin prompt)
stdlib only (shutil, argparse) — no third-party deps
templates are vendored under the perk's assets/ dir
usage: Set TEMPLATE_TYPE to one of general_medical|rehabilitation|mental_health|chronic_disease|perioperative|pain_management. Output: template.tex.
limitation: Only copies a template; it does not customize placeholders or compile LaTeX. An unknown TEMPLATE_TYPE yields an empty/fallback output rather than a real template.
